fundamentals.name: Cadet Kinetic Frame
fundamentals.subtitle: Precision trainer
fundamentals.description: Standard kinetic trainer. Stay on target and break formation before the warden arrives.
fundamentals.notes: Balanced recoil, focused shots, and a shield slot make this the cleanest frame for learning lane control.

area_control.name: Area Control Frame
area_control.subtitle: Swarm breaker
area_control.description: Wide plasma spread tuned for interceptor packs. Sweep lanes and keep pressure on clustered wings.
area_control.notes: Micro-shots, plasma burn, and explosive impact tuning turn this into the anti-swarm testbed.

armor_break.name: Armor Break Frame
armor_break.subtitle: Heavy punch
armor_break.description: Large focused kinetic slugs with pierce. Commit to heavy targets and push through plated lines.
armor_break.notes: This frame trades blanket coverage for control, shield support, and a plated backup module.
